seo.title: Traveliko by Wink | Hotel Marketplace for Direct Demand
seo.ogTitle: Traveliko by Wink | A Hotel Marketplace Connected to Direct Demand
seo.ogDescription: Traveliko gives travelers a place to discover hotel offers, packages, and benefits while hotels stay connected to the Wink commerce layer.

content.h1: A Wink-operated marketplace for hotel demand.

fields.h1: A Wink-operated marketplace for hotel demand.

fields.heading: A Wink-operated marketplace for hotel demand.
Choose the next step that fits your role.

cards.title: Stay with a perk.
cards.body: Packages, benefits, and bookable stays can appear in a consumer-friendly marketplace surface.

cards.title: Breakfast, spa, or experience add-ons
cards.body: Benefits can travel with the offer instead of being buried in fine print.

cards.title: Destination-friendly discovery
cards.body: Travelers can browse around the type of trip they want to book.

cards.title: See what makes the stay worth booking.
cards.body: Traveliko can highlight the offer, not just a room name and a nightly rate.

cards.title: Bundle the reason to travel.
cards.body: Rooms, benefits, dining, spa, or experiences can sit closer to the booking moment.

cards.title: Make benefits visible.
cards.body: Breakfast, upgrades, credits, or direct-booking perks can be presented clearly.

cards.title: Participation
cards.body: Hotels decide whether and how Traveliko fits into their channel mix.

cards.title: Offers
cards.body: Rates, perks, packages, and eligible stays stay connected to the Wink setup.

cards.title: Booking logic
cards.body: The booking path resolves through the same commerce layer as direct and partner demand.

items.question: Is Traveliko a separate product?
items.answer: No. Traveliko is a Wink-operated consumer marketplace channel connected to the Wink platform.

items.question: Who uses Traveliko?
items.answer: Travelers use Traveliko to discover hotel offers and stays. Hotels use Wink to manage whether and how they participate in the channel.

items.question: Does Traveliko replace direct booking?
items.answer: No. Traveliko is one demand channel. Wink also supports hotel websites, partner storefronts, social links, and developer integrations.

items.question: Can hotels control their Traveliko participation?
items.answer: Yes. Traveliko should be presented as a channel hotels can manage through the Wink platform, subject to approved product settings.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
